title: tabernaemontana obliqua
intro: Tabernaemontana obliqua, also known as the Yellow Trumpet Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of various alkaloids such as voacangine and voacristine. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana obliqua include its potential use in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its ability to act as a natural antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
